name: Global Development & Environmental Resources, Inc.
summary: Global Development & Environmental Resources, Inc. provides risk assessments, engineering, construction-development, and environmental services to public and private clients. Its products include PZ-22X, a road stabilization solution and a soil-stabilizing product for road construction and maintenance. The company offers environmental site assessment services, environmental site investigation services, environmental remedial cleanup services, strategies and revitalization services, witness and public relation services, microbiological services, wastewater and storm water services, and hazardous cleanup services, as well as investment services, including acquisition services, divestiture services, and valuation services. Global Development & Environmental Resources, Inc. is based in Las Vegas, Nevada. The company also has offices in Rockford, Illinois; Long Island, New York; Miami, Florida; Atlanta, Georgia; Shanghai, People Republic of China; Hanoi, Social Republic of Vietnam; Santiago, Chile; and Italy.
